rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And For Appointmnet Of Meutral Arbitrator
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 12, 2016, line 1. PETITIONER JENNY KIM Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration And For Appointmnet Of Neutral Arbitrator is OFF CALENDAR. No proof of service for the petition or the motion on file. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Pure Entertainment, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint Naming Does 1-4
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 12, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED, VLAD COOD Pure Entertainment, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint Naming Does 1-4 is GRANTED as requested. Late opposition filed by deceased named defendant is stricken. (CCP 1005) No courtesy copy of such opposition was delivered. (SFLR 2.7B). =(501/AJR)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 12, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA GILES MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL HO VS. CAN TANG YU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Answer And To Reclassify And Relate Cases Or Alternatively Transfer Of Motion To Dept. 206 Or 302 For Hearing And Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 12, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT CAN YU Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Amend Answer And To Reclassify And Relate Cases Or Alternatively Transfer Of Motion To Dept. 206 Or 302 For Hearing And Adjudication is DENIED as follows: (1) Motion for leave to amend is denied as the moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1324; (2) motion to reclassify and relate is denied as both actions (553102 and 655388) are already pending in department 501 per SFLR 8.10 and because Defendant failed to cite any authority for the proposition that an action filed as an unlawful detainer loses its summary designation if defendant contends that the landlord-tenant relationship is subject to a new lease and files an affirmative lawsuit. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday September 12, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE PETERSON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. =(501/AJR)

DEFENDANT STEPHANIE PETERSON Notice Of Motion On Demurrer By Defendant Stephanie Peterson To Complaint Of Plaintiff Yuen Lo Chi is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in paragraphs 5, 6 and the Notice. =(501/AJR)
